exceptions.reason: No role="grid" anywhere -- the wide layout is a bare native <table>, and grep confirms zero role attributes of any kind in the file.
No role="row" is set anywhere; rows are plain <tr> in the wide layout or plain <div> in the narrow, card-mode layout.
No role="gridcell", "columnheader" or "rowheader" anywhere; cells are plain <td>/<th> or plain <div>s in the narrow layout.
No aria-labelledby or aria-label anywhere in the file -- confirmed by grep, zero aria- attributes of any kind.

No tabIndex anywhere. When `onRowClick` is set a whole row becomes clickable (onClick, cursor:pointer) but is never made a keyboard target -- no tabIndex=0, no role, nothing. A mouse is the only way to activate a row.
No onKeyDown handler exists anywhere in the file. This is a defect, recorded so it stops looking like a component nobody had anything to say about.
Same as ArrowKeys -- no keyboard handling exists at all.
Same as ArrowKeys -- no keyboard handling exists at all.
